title: Stack Fix
description: Allows 16-stack items to be stacked to 64
body:
# Stack Fix

This mod prevents inventory clogging by making items that stack to 16 stack to 64 instead. These include:

- Signs
- Ender Pearls
- Eye of Ender
- Snowballs
- Eggs
- Armor Stands
- Written Book
- Buckets
- Banners

Enjoy!
